[Popular Zaps](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360033132114-Working-with-Zapier#PopularZaps)

## What is Zapier?

Zapier is a tool for creating automations between different web applications. By automating manual tasks, it makes your life easier and creates time for more productive pursuits. Zapier is a great alternative when a direct integration is not available - Zapier can also expand the functionality of existing integrations.

You can select from [1,500+ Apps](https://zapier.com/apps) to connect with one another.

Zapier is a third-party platform that you need to sign up for and purchase separately from Thinkific. Check out [Zapier's plans and pricing options](https://zapier.com/pricing) and see how you can [connect Zapier to your Thinkific site](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/10988279138967).

> Zapier is a great solution when there's no existing app for the tool you're using. But if you haven't, make sure to check out the [Thinkific App Store](https://apps.thinkific.com/?utm_source=support&utm_medium=kb&utm_campaign=thinkific-kb) — the app you want may already be supported directly!

## What are Zaps?

A **Zap** is the name given to a connected action within Zapier. Each Zap is broken down into Triggers and Actions.

A Trigger is the first step of an event, which sends information to the Action app. If you have trouble remembering which is which, then think of it as "if **trigger** … then… **action**"

![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/360044636893)

#### Examples

- Save [Gmail](https://zapier.com/apps/gmail/integrations) emails matching certain traits to a [Google Sheet](https://zapier.com/apps/google-sheets/integrations)

_Trigger_: Gmail

_Action_: Google Sheet
- Create a [Google calendar](https://zapier.com/apps/google-calendar/integrations) event after submitting a Google Form questionnaire

_Trigger_: Google Form

_Action_: Google Calendar
- Share new [Facebook Page](https://zapier.com/apps/facebook/integrations) posts in [Slack](https://zapier.com/apps/slack/integrations)

_Trigger_: Facebook

_Action_: Slack

Triggers and Actions can be multidirectional depending on which application is sending and receiving information. For example, Gmail and Google sheets can both be used for similar, but different actions.

Thinkific has a [range of different Triggers, Actions, and Search](https://zapier.com/zapbook/thinkific/) that any Zap can contain.

## Triggers

You can use triggers in Zapier to send information out of Thinkific and into another app. This works well for automating tasks as a result of events on your Thinkific site.

![](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/360043763454)

We support the following Thinkific Triggers in Zapier:

1. **New Order:** Fires when a student places an order for a course, community, or bundle. Free courses do not generate an order if you use our two-page checkout however if you have opted into our [single-page checkout](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360045483433), free courses will generate an order. If the order has a 100%-off coupon code applied, it still counts as an order (this applies to both checkouts).
2. **New Free Preview Enrollment:** Fires when a student enrolls in the [free preview](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030722473) of a course. Free trials are differentiated from full enrollments.
3. **New Full Enrollment:** Fires when a student enrolls (or is [manually enrolled](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030716993)) in the full version of a course. This excludes instances where a student is enrolled in [Course Bundles](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030722713).
4. **Course Completed:** Fires when a student completes their course by reaching 100% progress.
5. **New User:** Fires when a student signs up for a user account on your Thinkific site. This will fire regardless of whether the user also enrolls in a course.
6. **Lesson Completed:** Fires when a student completes a lesson (either a specific lesson or a percentage of lessons) in a particular course.
7. **Subscription Cancelled:** Fires when a student cancels an active subscription to a course or bundle.
8. **New Lead**: Fires when a new lead is created in Thinkific. Learn more about how to [generate leads here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030722813) and [how to manage leads here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030722933).

#### Examples of Uses for Thinkific Triggers:

- Add users to a specific mailing list when they sign up for your course using an Action app like AWeber, GetResponse, or MailChimp.
- Update your CRM records when a user completes the course using an Action app like Capsule, HubSpot, Salesforce, or Zoho.
- Add student data to a spreadsheet using Action apps like Smartsheet or Google Sheets.
- Send a push notification to your phone when you receive a new order.

> Looking to send information to your CRM? Learn how to [integrate with HubSpot here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/29435174698519) and [with Salesforce here](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360047035174).

## Actions

Actions are available on our [Grow plan and higher](https://www.thinkific.com/pricing/). They allow you to send information in as well as out. For example, you can create a new user in your Thinkific account using an Action in Zapier.

![Triggers_and_Actions.png](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/360043763554)

The following Thinkific Actions are supported in Zapier:

1. **Enroll User:** Create a new user/student and enroll them in a specific [course](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030371674) or [bundle](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030722713).
2. **Unenroll User:** End a student's enrollment in a specific course or bundle immediately or at a future date.

#### Examples of Uses for Thinkific Actions:

- Create your sales funnel using external sales and checkout pages with a Trigger app like Ontraport, ClickFunnels, or Marketo and use the 'Enroll User' Action in Zapier to automatically add the user to your Thinkific account and enroll them into your course or bundle.
- Charge varying tax rates, depending on your customer’s location using a Trigger app like Quaderno or Taxamo.
- Take payment for multiple products at once using a shopping cart app like SamCart or Shopify.
- Use a payment gateway other than Stripe or PayPal using a Trigger app like Alipay, Apple pay, or Braintree.
- Unenroll a user upon completion of the course.
- Update users:



In the case that the student already exists in Thinkific, **Enroll User** will update the existing student. The existing student can be enrolled in a new course or bundle, or their information can be updated (first name, last name), or an expiry date can be added to an existing enrollment. Adding an expiry date of the current day to an existing enrollment is how you can end a student’s enrollment. In addition, it can create a new student without any enrollments if no course or bundle is specified.

## Search

Besides Triggers and Actions, you can also use search as an intermediary step in your Zaps:

- _Search User_: Search for users in Thinkific by ID or email.  - Note: Search will return information on custom fields and students in Thinkific.

#### Examples of Uses for Thinkific Search:

- Send Group-specific emails when a student enrolls and is a member of a Group
- Update the contact in your CRM when a student enters information into a custom field (eg. location, interest)

> [Custom fields](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030358374) can’t be sent to Thinkific, but custom fields can be sent out of Thinkific to another application when a student signs up. As this is only available on initial sign up, this applies to the **New User** trigger only.

## Explore Using Zapier and Thinkific

Zapier provides all the information you need to explore your options! You can get started with:

- [Pre-Made Zaps](https://get.thinkific.com/zapier-app/) Click an app that you want to connect to Thinkific. Zapier's on-screen instructions will walk you through the rest of the process!
- [App Directory](https://zapier.com/apps)
- [Zapier Knowledge Base](https://zapier.com/learn/)

> When you create a zap, the test data that is used as part of the test is not real and may not be accurate. Real data will only be sent through once your zap is published.

## Key features

- Easily automate your repetitive tasks & workflows
- Connect Thinkific with thousands of apps
- Quickly build out custom student experiences

## Overview

**Automate repetitive tasks and increase operational efficiency on your Thinkific site!**

[Zapier](https://zapier.com/) enables you to connect housands of apps to your Thinkific site to automate your workflows and be more productive. You can easily create your own Thinkific Zapier integrations with the tools you currently use to increase your efficiency and grow your online business. Zapier allows you to instantly connect Thinkific with 1,500+ apps to automate your work and find productivity super powers!

**Zapier allows for Triggers and Actions (Grow plan or higher) to be utilized for your Thinkific site:**

- _Triggers:_ You can use triggers to send information out of Thinkific and into another app. This works well for automating tasks as a result of events on your Thinkific site. Many triggers are supported in Thinkific including but not limited to new orders, new enrollments and courses completed.
- _Actions:_ Allow you to send information into the Thinkific platform as well as out. This supports automatically enrolling or unenrolling students based on predefined triggers.

![Zapier](https://import.cdn.thinkific.com/1/app_store/JJ8slb9WShmo5QfG5fFt_Dashboard%20Zapier%202022-11-03%20at%203_53_04%20PM.jpg)

## Not quite what you were looking for?

Discover even more apps to help you tap into advanced analytics and business tools

web.description: Build powerful reports that tie together Salesforce contacts and Thinkific user data · Automatically sync new student data into your CRM · Sync student data with ...
web.markdown:
- [Browse apps](https://apps.thinkific.com/categories)

- [Thinkific Facebook group](https://www.facebook.com/groups/Thinkific)
- [Thinkific on Twitter](https://twitter.com/thinkific)
- [Thinkific on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/thinkific)
- [Thinkific on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/user/Thinkific)
- [Thinkific on Pinterest](https://www.pinterest.ca/Thinkific/)

![Empower your team by bringing all of your customer education data into the world’s most popular and powerful CRM.](https://import.cdn.thinkific.com/1/app_store/1651601800_ac48c4e7ba1cac763295a6cac0f6e626.png)

## Key features

- Build powerful reports that tie together Salesforce contacts and Thinkific user data
- Automatically sync new student data into your CRM
- Sync student data with your Salesforce contacts to easily track engagement.

## Overview

The [Salesforce](https://www.salesforce.com/) app brings all of your data into one place by giving your team control over how it is used or displayed. See the true impact education has on your bottom line by generating powerful reports that tie together Salesforce contacts and Thinkific user data.

**Access data from multiple Thinkific sites in Salesforce**

Thinkific Plus sets you up with a minimum of three Thinkific sites to meet all of your customer, partner, and employee education needs. Whether you’re using multiple sites for branding B2B education portals, reaching your users in different languages, or supporting employee groups with unique learning environments, the Salesforce app brings together all of your Thinkific user data in one place to create powerful, unified reports.

**Combine CRM and user data**

Enrich your existing CRM with data from your Thinkific students, course progress, and completion rates across all of your Thinkific sites. No more manual data replication of your LMS instances to your CRM.

**Build your funnel**

- Track lead generation and sales opportunities for prospects that interact with your online courses and merge them directly into your sales funnel.
- Track learner progress to drive product adoption.
- Monitor learner progress to identify the gaps in your training programs and make data-driven decisions on how to improve your content and support your customers better.

You will need to integrate your Salesforce Instance (Salesforce Lightning Experience) with each of your Thinkific schools/sites manually for now.

This app is currently in beta and available to [Thinkific Plus customers](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/). Make sure to reach out to your Customer Success Manager if you want to learn more!

![Salesforce](https://import.cdn.thinkific.com/1/app_store/1651601801_e2527c02a493dae3255497c8ff4443a8.png)

## Not quite what you were looking for?

Discover even more apps to help you grow and nurture your audience with top email marketing tools
